title: Full gate report text
description:
Show the complete checker report on gate inspection rather than a truncated fragment.

## Background

`print_gate_run_details` truncates the report at `.take(20)` lines (main.rs:418,422) and then prints a file path (main.rs:425) instead of the body, so agents glob the raw run files to read the full report. The full stdout/stderr is already stored, so the truncation is the only obstacle.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-07: gate inspection output contains the complete checker report with no line truncation and no substitution of a file path for the report body.

## Notes

Touch main.rs:388-426; self-contained. Emit the full stored checker report with no truncation and no file-path substitution.
